basics.name: Germaine Juan
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.S. in Computer Science and a B.A. in Ethnic Studies with a minor in Ilokano Language & Literature at the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa. I expect to graduate in Spring, 2023.

education.institution: University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa, Honolulu, HI
education.area: Computer Science - Data Science & Ethnic Studies, minor in Ilokano Language & Literature (expected Spring, 2023)

work.summary: Advise freshmen within the the College of Natural Sciences
highlights: Provide academic advising to freshmen with less than 30 earned credits in the following majors: Biology, Botany, Computer Science, Information & Computer Sciences, and Marine Biology

work.summary: Assist instructor with online Pamantasan courses in Ilokano language and Ethnic Studies with expected large enrollment of UH community college students
highlights: Assist with Zoom and Laulima classroom management
Read and grade student papers and exams for the courses
Vice President of Administration, Timpuyog Organization, 2020-Present
Recording Secretary, Timpuyog Organization, UH Manoa, 2019-2020

awards.title: B.A. in Ilokano Language & Literature Scholarship Fund
awards.summary: Scholarship awarded to student in the Ilokano Language & Literature Program and demonstrated potential of making a valuable contribution to Filipino culture and Hawaiʻi society.

awards.title: Tria Kerkvliet Undergraduate Student Scholarship Endowment
awards.summary: Scholarship awarded to student serviced by the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa Office of Multicultural Serices in the Student Equity Excellence & Diversity (SEED) Office and who is pursuing a degree at the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa.

awards.title: EAAUH Scholarship
awards.awarder: Engineering Alumni Association of the University of Hawaii
awards.summary: Scholarship awarded to first-year incoming freshman pursuing a degree in the College of Engineerings at the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa.
